name: lazy-memvid-client-init
description: MemoryStore uses lazy memvid client initialization via async _ensure_client() to defer import until first use, enabling tests to inject mock memvid module via sys.modules before instantiation

name: mock-external-sdk-tests
description: Test external SDKs (memvid) by injecting mock module into sys.modules before importing dependent code, avoiding ModuleNotFoundError when SDK is not installed
